# SBA Local Assistance 77084 SBDC Results for Harris County

## Resource summary
The SBA local-assistance SBDC search for ZIP 77084 identifies local resources in Harris County, Texas and displays four SBA Resource Partner SBDC results:
- Texas SBDC Houston Lee College.
- Texas SBDC Houston Prairie View A&M.
- Texas SBDC Houston San Jacinto College.
- Texas SBDC Houston University of Houston.

## BOSS use
Use this source when a user says they are in 77084, Houston, Katy, or Harris County and wants SBDC support. Treat it as the official SBA locator entry point.

## User-facing next action
Open the source URL, confirm the resource partner list, and click the local SBDC website that best matches the user's address/county/service area.
